name: Kingso
short_description: Kingso is a turn-based 2D strategy game in the medieval fantasy genre, featuring diverse mechanics that make each match unique. Set on the continent of Avelir, will you change its fate or allow its destruction?
detailed_description:
Kingso - Turn-based Strategy in the style of Medieval Fantasy, where you’ll be managing your character, party and even civilization with a specific set of game mechanics.

You’ll find yourself in various and sometimes completely unpredictable situations. Each match will depend directly on your gameplay methods, decisions and randomness.

By following this path, you will be able to immerse yourself in the story of the Avelir continent, its economy, construction, leveling, diplomacy, battles with lords and bandits, and much more, making each of your playthroughs unique from the previous one.

Will you be able to change the fate of the continent Avelir, or will you allow its destruction?

supported_languages: English, Russian, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Portuguese - Portugal, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, French, Italian, German, Dutch, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America, Turkish
